name: logging design: every logging and analysis concern is grounded in a catalog source
command:
cat > pc.json <<'JEOF'
{"complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"medical booking","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"analytics","integration_scope":"external-partner","data_cadence":"real-time"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile pc.json --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const O=(j.pillars["operational-excellence"]||[]);process.exit(O.length>=5&&O.every(c=>c.grounding==="grounded")?0:1)' && echo all-grounded 1>&2
